name_cn:
【Top】🔥Marmont Quilted
Brand new Tote bag, the entire body is made of original factory cowhide❗️Added a lock design at the opening for extra security. The original leather texture is amazing. The 3D quilted pattern comes alive under the light. Very easy to style and suits all heights. A versatile must-have item!
Model 681483 Dimensions 26.5*19*11cm
